name: No guaranteed investment returns
message: Investment messaging must not imply guaranteed returns.
suggestion: Use risk-aware language and include a disclosure that returns are not guaranteed.

name: Finance disclosure required
message: Investing-related creative must include a clear risk disclosure.
suggestion: Add a disclosure such as 'Investing involves risk. Returns are not guaranteed.'

name: Google headline length
message: Google Search headlines should stay within 30 characters for preview readability.
suggestion: Shorten the headline while keeping the message intact.

name: Google description length
message: Google Search descriptions should stay within 90 characters for preview readability.
suggestion: Trim the description to the most important proof point.

name: LinkedIn intro text length
message: LinkedIn intro text should stay concise enough for preview readability.
suggestion: Tighten the opening sentence and keep the proof point.

name: Email core fields required
message: Email creative must include subject, preheader, and body copy.
suggestion: Fill in the missing email fields before approval.

name: CTA required
message: Each creative variant needs a clear CTA.
suggestion: Add a direct next step that matches the channel and KPI.

name: Variant metadata required
message: Each creative variant must include persona, channel, journey stage, and KPI mapping metadata.
suggestion: Repair the variant metadata before continuing the workflow.

name: Variant mapping must match the journey
message: Creative variants must map to a valid persona, channel, journey stage, and KPI from the generated journey.
suggestion: Align the variant metadata with the generated strategy and journey outputs.
